about.privacy.title: Our Privacy Commitment
about.privacy.desc: 🛡 We do not store any data you generate or use on our platform. All tools run either entirely in your browser or are processed server-side and immediately discarded. We do not use tracking cookies or sell your data to third parties.

privacy.s1.title: 1. Information We Collect
privacy.s1.intro: Tool Box Nova is designed with privacy at its core. We do not collect, store, or share any personal information you input into our tools. Specifically:
privacy.s1.li1: Passwords generated are never transmitted to our servers
privacy.s1.li2: Virtual addresses generated are never stored
privacy.s1.li3: Temporary email addresses are deleted after expiry
privacy.s2.title: 2. Cookies
privacy.s2.desc: We use a single cookie to remember your language preference (lang). This cookie contains no personally identifiable information and is not used for tracking.
privacy.s3.title: 3. Analytics
privacy.s3.desc: We may use privacy-respecting analytics (such as aggregated page view counts) to understand which tools are most useful. No individual user data is collected.
privacy.s4.title: 4. Third-Party Services
privacy.s4.desc: Some tools (such as SMS Receiver) may interface with third-party APIs. These services have their own privacy policies. We recommend reviewing them before use.
privacy.s5.title: 5. Google Ads
privacy.s5.desc: We may display Google Ads on this site. Google may use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits. You can opt out via Google Ad Settings.
privacy.s6.title: 6. Contact
privacy.s6.desc: For privacy-related questions, please contact us.

ailab.detector.feature.speed_desc: Get accurate AI detection results in under 3 seconds.
ailab.detector.feature.free_desc: No signup, no subscription. 15,000 characters free every time.
ailab.detector.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
ailab.detector.faq.q1: How accurate is the AI detector?
ailab.detector.faq.a1: Our AI detector achieves 99% accuracy across diverse text samples, tested against GPTZero, Originality.AI, and other leading tools. It detects content from ChatGPT, GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and all major AI models.
ailab.detector.faq.q2: Which AI detectors does it check against?
ailab.detector.faq.a2: We simulate scores from 8 major AI detectors: GPTZero, Turnitin, Copyleaks, ZeroGPT, Writer.com, Sapling, Originality.AI, and Winston AI — all in one click.
ailab.detector.faq.q3: How does the AI humanizer work?
ailab.detector.faq.a3: Our humanizer uses advanced language models to rewrite AI-generated text, preserving your original meaning while introducing natural human writing patterns — varied sentence structure, idiomatic expressions, and authentic tone.
ailab.detector.faq.q4: Is my text stored or shared?
ailab.detector.faq.a4: No. Your text is processed in real-time and never stored on our servers. We take privacy seriously and comply with GDPR.
ailab.detector.faq.a5: Both AI detection and humanization support 50+ languages including English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, Arabic, Hindi, and more.
ailab.detector.faq.a6: Free users can check up to 15,000 characters per request — the highest free limit among all major competitors. No signup required.
ailab.detector.faq.a7: Our humanizer significantly reduces AI detection scores across all major detectors including Turnitin. Our tests show a 95%+ success rate with Enhanced and Ultra modes.

ailab.detector.error.rate_limit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
ailab.detector.toast.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

color.faq.q1: Are my files uploaded to a server?
color.faq.a1: Never. All operations run in your browser. No data leaves your device.
color.faq.a2: HEX, RGB, HSL, HSV, CMYK, LAB, LCH, OKLCH, HWB, and XYZ with instant conversion.
color.faq.q3: What is the APCA contrast algorithm?
color.faq.a3: APCA is the next-gen contrast standard for WCAG 3.0 with more accurate readability predictions.
color.faq.q4: Can I export palettes for Figma or Tailwind?
color.faq.a4: Yes! CSS, SCSS, Tailwind config, JSON, ASE, GPL, PNG, and SVG export formats.
color.faq.q5: How does the palette generator work?
color.faq.a5: Press spacebar for harmonious palettes. Lock favorites and keep generating.

pc.feature.privacy_desc: Passwords are hashed locally in your browser. We use k-Anonymity — only a 5-character hash prefix is ever transmitted. Your actual password never leaves your device.
pc.feature.speed_desc: Backed by Cloudflare's global CDN with 99.9% cache hit rates. Get breach results in milliseconds, not seconds.
pc.feature.free_desc: No sign-up, no subscription, no hidden fees. Check unlimited emails and passwords at no cost whatsoever.
pc.faq.q1: How does the email breach check work?
pc.faq.a1: We query the Have I Been Pwned database through our secure backend proxy. Your email is sent to our server, which forwards it to the HIBP API and returns the results. We never store your email address.
pc.faq.q2: Is my password safe when I check it here?
pc.faq.a2: Absolutely. Your password is hashed using SHA-1 directly in your browser. Only the first 5 characters of the hash are sent to our server. Your actual password never leaves your browser — this is called k-Anonymity.
pc.faq.q3: What should I do if my email appears in a breach?
pc.faq.a3: Change the password for the affected account immediately. Enable two-factor authentication wherever possible. Use our built-in password generator to create a strong, unique password.
pc.faq.q4: How is this different from Have I Been Pwned?
pc.faq.a4: We provide the same breach database plus additional features: real-time password strength analysis, a secure password generator, multilingual support, and personalized security recommendations.
pc.faq.q5: Do you store any of my data?
pc.faq.a5: No. We operate on a zero-storage policy. Email queries are proxied in real-time and discarded. Passwords are hashed client-side and never transmitted in full.
